title: Manga Entertainment
wikitext:
{{stub}}

'''Manga Entertainment''' is a British distributor. They are known for having made the English release of [[Death and Rebirth]] and [[End of Evangelion]], bringing over the voice actors for the main characters in the ADV NGE dub, but most were still replaced.

See also: "Mangle Entertainment" and Commentary of Evil at the [[Geektionary]]

[[Category: A to Z]]
html:
This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!


Manga Entertainment is a British distributor. They are known for having made the English release of Death and Rebirth and End of Evangelion, bringing over the voice actors for the main characters in the ADV NGE dub, but most were still replaced.

See also: "Mangle Entertainment" and Commentary of Evil at the Geektionary
